channel.title: briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Forget the State of the Union. What's the state of your quiz score?
item.description: What's the state of your union, quiz-wise? Find out!

item.title: The Plunging Birthrate
item.description: We asked women about their views on having kids.

item.title: How India Became One of the World’s Biggest Economies
item.description: India has grown rapidly despite its slow industrialization, and its economy is now nearly as big as Japan’s.

item.title: A team of midlife cheerleaders in Ukraine refuses to let war defeat them
item.description: Ukrainian women in their 50s and 60s say they've embraced cheerleading as a way to cope with the extreme stress and anxiety of four years of Russia's ...

item.title: Takeaways from Hillary Clinton's deposition. And, Paramount outbids for Warner Bros.
item.description: Hillary Clinton says the questioning in a closed-door deposition with the House Oversight Committee's Epstein investigation was repetitive. And, Param...

item.title: With Possible Iran Strike Looming, U.S. Says Staff Can Leave Israel, and Urges Speed
item.description: In an email to embassy workers Friday morning, Ambassador Mike Huckabee warned them that if they wanted to leave Israel, they “should do so TODAY.”

item.title: Green Party Defeats Labour in U.K. Special Election, in Blow to Starmer
item.description: The result marks the first time the Greens have won a British parliamentary by-election and signals the frustration of left-leaning voters with Prime ...

item.title: As the U.S. celebrates its 250th birthday, many Latinos question whether they belong
item.description: Many U.S.-born Latinos feel afraid and anxious amid the political rhetoric. Still, others wouldn't miss celebrating their country

item.title: Pentagon Fires Another Laser at a Drone, Prompting a New Air Closure
item.description: After the downing of a Customs and Border Protection drone, the F.A.A. closed the airspace above Fort Hancock, Texas.

item.title: My doctor keeps focusing on my weight. What other health metrics matter more?
item.description: Our Real Talk with a Doc columnist explains how to push back if your doctor's obsessed with weight loss. And what other health metrics matter more ins...

item.title: With Possible Iran Strike Looming, U.S. Says Staff Can Leave Israel, and Urges Speed
item.description: In an email to embassy workers Friday morning, Ambassador Mike Huckabee warned them that if they wanted to leave Israel, they “should do so TODAY.”

item.title: Pakistan Strikes Afghanistan in ‘Open War’ Against Taliban Regime
item.description: The airstrikes came hours after Afghan troops had attacked Pakistani border positions and follow months of worsening relations between the neighboring...

item.title: Amid Rhetoric About Rupture With U.S., Finland Urges Calm
item.description: “We don’t need a bulldozer,” says Alexander Stubb, Finland’s president and a golf partner of President Trump. “Reform doesn’t mean destruction.”

item.title: Why Are Pakistan and Afghanistan Fighting?
item.description: The renewed violence between the neighboring countries stems from Pakistan’s accusations that Afghanistan’s Taliban government has harbored a militant...

item.title: Green Party Defeats Labour in U.K. Special Election, in Blow to Starmer
item.description: The result marks the first time the Greens have won a British parliamentary by-election and signals the frustration of left-leaning voters with Prime ...
